title: Wire WebLinksAddon into the terminal detail view so pane URLs are clickable
action: In web/src/views/terminal.ts, import WebLinksAddon from "@xterm/addon-web-links" and call term.loadAddon(new WebLinksAddon()) immediately after term.open(viewport) (around line 131). Do not change the Terminal constructor options, disableStdin, or any other behavior. The addon is already an installed dependency (web/package.json) and needs no config changes to auto-linkify URLs in the rendered screen.

truths: WebLinksAddon is imported from @xterm/addon-web-links in web/src/views/terminal.ts
term.loadAddon(new WebLinksAddon()) is called after term.open(viewport)
No other terminal behavior (disableStdin, theme, poll interval, resize logic) changes

artifacts.substantive: WebLinksAddon import + loadAddon call wired into renderTerminal

prohibitions: Do not add a new test harness for renderTerminal beyond what already exists

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Wired @xterm/addon-web-links WebLinksAddon into the terminal detail view: imported WebLinksAddon and called term.loadAddon(new WebLinksAddon()) right after term.open(viewport) in web/src/views/terminal.ts. Pane content is now auto-linkified — URLs in agent output render as clickable links.
trace.verify_output: tsc --noEmit + vite build: succeeded, bundle 308.82 kB. vitest --run: 3 test files, 20 tests passed (api.test.ts 12, terminal.test.ts 2, switcher.test.ts 6). Pre-existing stderr noise from xterm Color.ts canvas getContext in jsdom, unrelated to this change, not a failure.
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
